Index

B C M P Q S T

B

basicQuery(Blackhole) - Method in class com.github.query4j.benchmark.QueryPerformanceBenchmark
Benchmark Scenario 1: Basic Query - Single WHERE predicate - No joins, no aggregation - LIMIT/OFFSET for pagination Target: < 1 ms average
builderConstructionBasic(Blackhole) - Method in class com.github.query4j.benchmark.QueryPerformanceBenchmark
Benchmark: Builder Construction Only Measures just the time to create and configure the builder without SQL generation.
builderConstructionComplex(Blackhole) - Method in class com.github.query4j.benchmark.QueryPerformanceBenchmark
Benchmark: Complex Builder Construction Measures complex builder creation time.

C

com.github.query4j.benchmark - package com.github.query4j.benchmark
 
complexQuery(Blackhole) - Method in class com.github.query4j.benchmark.QueryPerformanceBenchmark
Benchmark Scenario 3: Complex Query - Multiple WHERE predicates with AND/OR - BETWEEN predicate - LIKE predicate - GROUP BY + HAVING - Aggregation (SUM) - Pagination Target: < 5 ms average

M

moderateQuery(Blackhole) - Method in class com.github.query4j.benchmark.QueryPerformanceBenchmark
Benchmark Scenario 2: Moderate Query - Two WHERE predicates combined with AND - One IN predicate - Simple ORDER BY Target: < 2 ms average

P

parameterExtractionBasic(Blackhole) - Method in class com.github.query4j.benchmark.QueryPerformanceBenchmark
Benchmark: Parameter Extraction Only Measures just the parameter extraction time.

Q

QueryPerformanceBenchmark - Class in com.github.query4j.benchmark
JMH Performance benchmarks for Query4j Dynamic Query Builder.
QueryPerformanceBenchmark() - Constructor for class com.github.query4j.benchmark.QueryPerformanceBenchmark
 

S

sample() - Static method in class com.github.query4j.benchmark.TestEntity
Creates a sample test entity for benchmarking.
setup() - Method in class com.github.query4j.benchmark.QueryPerformanceBenchmark
 
sqlGenerationBasic(Blackhole) - Method in class com.github.query4j.benchmark.QueryPerformanceBenchmark
Benchmark: SQL Generation Only Measures just the SQL string generation time.
sqlGenerationComplex(Blackhole) - Method in class com.github.query4j.benchmark.QueryPerformanceBenchmark
Benchmark: Complex SQL Generation Measures complex SQL string generation time.

T

TestEntity - Class in com.github.query4j.benchmark
Test entity for benchmarking Query4j performance.
TestEntity() - Constructor for class com.github.query4j.benchmark.TestEntity
